## Source: amazon-inspector (4d3ba88687c2454c8371f948d388d1aa11c628cc010daeee014c9dd60ad1c193)
The package etsyapp was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (919ce430631b9f294e4f67032799f5df86d6c943a20c330407641916d7aab63d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'etsyapp' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
